page.content:
The first table presents data on OVA specific IgE across various groups, with the header indicating the group and corresponding values. The NC group shows a value of 1.35 ± 0.12. The MC group exhibits a higher value at 4.59 ± 0.36 a. The lycopene 20 mg kg−1 group records 4.03 ± 0.44. The glycyrrhizin 10 mg kg−1 group has a value of 3.49 ± 0.35 a, while the glycyrrhizin 20 mg kg−1 group shows a lower value of 2.82 ± 0.17 b. Finally, the glycyrrhizin 30 mg kg−1 group presents the lowest value at 1.98 ± 0.13 b. 

The second table outlines item-specific metrics with headers for Item, Factor loadings, and Indicator reliabilities alongside thresholds for acceptable values, defined as greater than 0.5 for Factor loadings and greater than 0.3 for Indicator reliabilities. For item 1*, the Factor loading is 0.71 and the Indicator reliability is 0.50.
